intended_use: The Maestro System is intended to hold and position laparoscopes and laparoscopic instruments during laparoscopic surgical procedures.
intended_use_full: The Maestro System is intended to hold and position laparoscopes and laparoscopic instruments during laparoscopic surgical procedures.
target_condition: laparoscopic surgical procedures (general, gynecologic, and urologic)
ground_truth: Independent testing dataset containing videos with unseen instrument brands used to verify ML model performance against predefined specifications
other_metrics: ML model performance reported as lower bound of 95% confidence interval for Average Precision (AP) and Average Recall (AR) on independent testing dataset; payload capacity 4.4 lbs tested; maximum applied load compatibility with 5mm and 10mm laparoscopes
